mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO daily_basic (trade_date, ts_code, close, turnover_rate, turnover_rate_f, volume_ratio, pe, pe_ttm, pb, ps, ps_ttm, dv_ratio, dv_ttm, total_share, float_share, free_share, total_mv, circ_mv) VALUES
(#{i.tradeDate}, #{i.tsCode}, #{i.close}, #{i.turnoverRate}, #{i.turnoverRateF}, #{i.volumeRatio}, #{i.pe}, #{i.peTtm}, #{i.pb}, #{i.ps}, #{i.psTtm}, #{i.dvRatio}, #{i.dvTtm}, #{i.totalShare}, #{i.floatShare}, #{i.freeShare}, #{i.totalMv}, #{i.circMv})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM daily_basic WHERE
(trade_date = #{i.tradeDate} AND ts_code = #{i.tsCode})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM daily_basic WHERE ts_code = #{tsCode} AND trade_date = #{tradeDate} LIMIT 1
